scoringModel.formula: Final finding score = Severity (0-6) + Impact Evidence (0-2) + Novelty (0-2), capped at 10.

severityTiers.label: S4 Critical
severityTiers.detail: Platform critical, or CVSS 9.0 and above

severityTiers.label: S0 None
severityTiers.detail: Informational only, policy-only, or no verifiable security impact

impactEvidence.detail: Exploit path, affected asset or data, and real-world consequence are clearly evidenced
Impact evidence is partial or incomplete

students.name: Approval pending
students.notes: Student name hidden while approval for public display is pending. The organization acknowledged the finding as a true positive and fixed it after disclosure.

findings.title: Attachment/API access control issue acknowledged and fixed
findings.scoreReason: Medium-severity access control issue with strong impact evidence from acknowledgment and fix, but novelty is treated as confirmed non-zero-day.

students.name: Approval pending
students.notes: Student name hidden while approval for public display is pending. Provisional leaderboard entry based on reported bug bounty result.

findings.title: IoT authentication weakness in RTSP digest handling
findings.program: Bug bounty target withheld pending approval
findings.scoreReason: Provisional Medium finding: platform-reported P3 with partial impact evidence and no supported zero-day claim yet.
